text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Oka Sho, and all eyes are on
Hishi Amazon, as she's a favorite to win the Triple
Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's filled with emotion and wonder. The way she
sees it, this path will lead her to a stronger, better
version of herself.
